---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Trastuzumab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Trastuzumab</strong> 目前有 <strong>20 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Trastuzumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Metastatic breast cancer Kanjinti is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with HER2 positive metastatic breast cancer (MBC):  as monotherapy for the treatment of those patients who have...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>HER2 positive breast carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor positive breast cancer（99.9%）</li>
<li>normal breast-like subtype of breast carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor negative breast cancer（99.9%）</li>
<li>breast tumor luminal A or B（99.9%）</li>
<li>malignant cutaneous granular cell skin tumor（99.5%）</li>
<li>ectomesenchymoma（99.5%）</li>
<li>human herpesvirus 8-related tumor（99.5%）</li>
<li>middle ear neuroendocrine tumor（99.4%）</li>
<li>kidney pelvis sarcomatoid transitional cell carcinoma（99.0%）</li>
<li>prostatic urethra urothelial carcinoma（99.0%）</li>
<li>esotropia（99.0%）</li>
<li>infiltrating bladder urothelial carcinoma sarcomatoid variant（99.0%）</li>
<li>renal pelvis papillary urothelial carcinoma（99.0%）</li>
<li>cervical neuroblastoma（98.8%）</li>
<li>schwannoma of jugular foramen（98.7%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of buccal mucosa（98.7%）</li>
<li>inner ear neoplasm（98.7%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of hypopharynx（98.7%）</li>
<li>jugular foramen meningioma（98.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
